name: collapse-newlines
description: Replace all newline characters in a string with single spaces

input.description: JSON object containing a string at the specified path, or a raw string (with path="")

path.description: Dot-separated path to the string field. Use empty string for raw string input.

output.description: Same structure as input with newlines replaced by spaces in the target string

input.text:
line one
line two
line three

output.text: line one line two line three
